printed.name: Up Stretch 3
printed.setup: Starting in Up Stretch 1 position (page 53 Reformer MAWB)

movement.inhale: Lower pelvis into Front Support position (page 38 Mat MAWB), move carriage forward to stopper
movement.exhale: Lift pelvis, return to start position

cues: Hold carriage on stopper when transitioning from Long Stretch (page 61 Reformer MAWB) to Up Stretch 1,
Initate lifting pelvis from Long Stretch to Up Stretch with abdominals followed by back extensors
